lines.speaker: John
lines.text: I'm John, I specialise in archaeology and there's some very interesting ruins in this area.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that like fossils and stuff?

lines.speaker: John
lines.text: Oh my word no. Archaeology is the study of sentient races history through study of artefacts and ruins.

lines.speaker: John
lines.text: Well... we have no proof to suggest such.

lines.speaker: John
lines.text: This is our base camp for exploration of this wonderful island.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can do to help?

lines.speaker: John
lines.text: No, no. You've already helped admirably. Our lives are much more comfortable thank you.

lines.speaker: John
lines.text: Explore! There's so much here we don't understand.

lines.speaker: John
lines.text: I've heard there's a pretty spectacular structure up near the mountain, but I haven't gone there yet.

lines.speaker: John
lines.text: The paleontologists are getting very excited as there are fossils everywhere. Apparently even the sea birds use them to make their nests!

lines.speaker: John
lines.text: Have you heard about the wyverns? We saw some of them flying the first day we were here, but haven't found them since.
